description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a flat, overhanging dark roof. The facade is clad in light-colored panels, punctuated by rows of evenly spaced rectangular windows, giving the building a highly regular and symmetrical appearance. The structure features five stories, each with a consistent window arrangement, and two main entrances at the base of the front facade. The side elevations are plain, with fewer windows, while the rear mirrors the front but lacks visible entrances. The building's exterior suggests reinforced concrete or masonry construction, typical of utilitarian urban residential blocks. There are no visible balconies or decorative elements, emphasizing a functional, minimalist design.
description: A five-story, light-paneled apartment building with a flat dark roof, symmetrical window rows, and two main entrances on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entrances, five rows of windows, and the flat overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain wall with a vertical stack of windows and the depth of the roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front with symmetrical window rows but no visible entrances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, with a vertical window stack and plain wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in evenly spaced, symmetrical rows and columns across each facade, with each floor having a consistent pattern and alignment.
